# mica Provider

Interact with Pure Storage FlashBlade arrays via the REST API v2.22.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "mica" {
  endpoint = "https://flashblade.example.com"
  auth = {
    api_token = var.flashblade_api_token
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth` (Attributes) Authentication configuration for the FlashBlade array. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth))
- `ca_cert` (String) Inline PEM-encoded CA certificate string used for TLS verification.
- `ca_cert_file` (String) Path to a PEM-encoded CA certificate file used for TLS verification.
- `endpoint` (String) FlashBlade management endpoint URL (e.g. https://flashblade.example.com). Falls back to FLASHBLADE_HOST environment variable.
- `insecure_skip_verify` (Boolean) Disable TLS certificate verification. For testing and development only.
- `max_retries` (Number) Maximum number of retry attempts for transient errors (429, 5xx). Default: 3.

<a id="nestedatt--auth"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth`

Optional:

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) API token for session-based authentication. Falls back to FLASHBLADE_API_TOKEN environment variable.
- `oauth2` (Attributes) OAuth2 token-exchange authentication configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth--oauth2))

<a id="nestedatt--auth--oauth2"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth.oauth2`

Optional:

- `client_id` (String, Sensitive) OAuth2 client ID. Falls back to FLASHBLADE_OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID environment variable.
- `issuer` (String) OAuth2 issuer. Falls back to FLASHBLADE_OAUTH2_ISSUER environment variable.
- `key_id` (String, Sensitive) OAuth2 key ID. Falls back to FLASHBLADE_OAUTH2_KEY_ID environment variable.
